da.intro: Yoga Bible er et professionelt lærings- og praksismiljø. Denne Code of Conduct beskriver de standarder, vi forventer af deltagere, studerende, kunder, undervisere, medarbejdere, freelancere og samarbejdspartnere — både i studio og online.
da.applies_to: Gælder for: YogaBible.dk + underbrands (Hot Yoga Copenhagen, Vibro Yoga, Namaste Studios, Namaste Online, Yoga Bible International).
da.standard_professionalism: Professionalisme: Vi behandler hinanden som voksne og seriøse praktikere
da.standard_privacy: Privatliv: Ingen deling af andres data uden samtykke
da.s1_text: Adfærd i overensstemmelse med lov, etik og yogiske værdier. Forventninger: respektfuld kommunikation selv ved uenighed; nultolerance for chikane, mobning, diskrimination, intimidering; ærlighed og ingen manipulation; personligt ansvar for kropbevidsthed og instruktionsfølgning; beskyttelse af andres privatliv og data.
da.s2_intro: Yoga Bible er et inkluderet rum. Ikke acceptabelt:
da.s2_sexual: Uønsket seksuel opmærksomhed, kommentarer eller berøring
da.s2_threats: Trusler, hån, ydmygelse, aggressiv tone, stalking
da.s2_discrimination: Diskrimination baseret på køn, alder, etnicitet, religion, seksualitet, handicap
da.s2_pressure: At presse andre til at dele personlige oplysninger eller krydse grænser
da.s2_unsafe: At skabe utrygge miljøer gennem gentagne forstyrrelser eller manglende respekt
da.s2_quote: "Nej" er en komplet sætning. Respekt for personlige grænser er ikke til forhandling.
da.s3_text: Lyt til din krop; stop ved svimmelhed, smerte eller ubehag. Informer undervisere om graviditet, skader, sygdom eller særlige behov. Ingen deltagelse under påvirkning af alkohol eller stoffer. Mobil på lydløs; ingen høj snak under instruktion.
da.s3_adjustments_text: Undervisere kan bruge hands-on justeringer. Du kan altid fravælge det. Afvisning respekteres øjeblikkeligt. Kommuniker tydeligt. Opt-out system (diskret kort/markering ved måtten) kan implementeres.
da.s3_minors_text: Skriftligt forældresamtykke kræves; forælder/værge skal være til stede; værge ansvarlig for adfærd, sikkerhed og kommunikation.
da.s4_title: 4. Hygiejne, Orden og Respekt for Faciliteter
da.s4_text: Ankom ren med passende påklædning; brug udstyr korrekt og sæt det pænt på plads; smid affald ud; rapporter skader eller sikkerhedsproblemer med det samme.
da.s5_integrity: Akademisk/professionel integritet: Ingen plagiering; ingen deling af manualer, PDF'er eller undervisningsmaterialer; studerende kan ikke optage undervisning eller fotografere materialer. Feedback gives professionelt uden udskamning.
da.s5_boundaries: Professionelle grænser: Klare grænser mellem undervisere og studerende; ingen flirt, pres eller favorisering i uddannelsessettings.
da.s6_text: Skal afspejle studiostandarder i kommentarer, DM'er, grupper, e-mails og platforme. Ingen chikane, angribende tone, udskamning, spam, trusler, doxxing eller uautoriseret deling af links/logins/optagelser.
da.s7_text: Alt indhold er beskyttet af copyright. Deltagere/studerende kan ikke optage klasser/kurser eller fotografere materialer. Yoga Bible kan optage under undervisning og events til undervisning og markedsføring.
da.s8_confidentiality: Fortrolighed: Kundelister, interne systemer, undervisningsdesign, priser, strategi og materialer er fortrolige — også efter samarbejdet ophører.
da.s8_nonsolicit: Non-Solicit: Ingen elev-poaching eller kunde/elev-omdirigering. Standard: 24-måneders non-solicit periode.
da.s9_studio: I studiet: Fortæl underviser eller reception, følg op via e-mail
da.s9_details: Oplys: Hvad skete, hvornår, hvor; hvem var involveret; screenshots/dokumentation hvis relevant; hvilket resultat ønskes.
da.s10_text: Proportionale, case-by-case vurderinger. Mulige handlinger: vejledning og advarsel; midlertidig pause eller adgangsbegrænsning; øjeblikkelig fjernelse fra session; lukning af digital adgang; samarbejds-/kontraktophør; politianmeldelse ved alvorlige sager.
da.closing: Tak fordi du bidrager til et stærkt og trygt miljø.

en.intro: Yoga Bible is a professional learning and practice environment. This Code of Conduct describes the standards we expect from participants, students, clients, teachers, staff, freelancers, and collaborators — both in the studio and online.
en.applies_to: Applies to: YogaBible.dk + sub-brands (Hot Yoga Copenhagen, Vibro Yoga, Namaste Studios, Namaste Online, Yoga Bible International).
en.standard_saucha: Saucha: Cleanliness, order, respect for the space
en.standard_professionalism: Professionalism: We treat each other as adults and serious practitioners
en.standard_privacy: Privacy: No sharing of others' data without consent
en.s1_text: Conduct in accordance with law, ethics, and yogic values. Expectations: respectful communication even in disagreement; zero tolerance for harassment, bullying, discrimination, intimidation; honesty and no manipulation; personal responsibility for body awareness and following instructions; protection of others' privacy and data.
en.s2_intro: Yoga Bible is an inclusive space. Not acceptable:
en.s2_sexual: Unwanted sexual attention, comments, or touch
en.s2_threats: Threats, ridicule, humiliation, aggressive tone, stalking
en.s2_discrimination: Discrimination based on gender, age, ethnicity, religion, sexuality, disability
en.s2_pressure: Pressuring others to share personal information or cross boundaries
en.s2_unsafe: Creating unsafe environments through repeated disruption or lack of respect
en.s2_quote: "No" is a complete sentence. Respect for personal boundaries is non-negotiable.
en.s3_text: Listen to your body; stop if you feel dizziness, pain, or discomfort. Inform teachers about pregnancy, injuries, illness, or special needs. No participation under the influence of alcohol or drugs. Phone on silent; no loud talking during instruction.
en.s3_adjustments_text: Teachers may use hands-on adjustments. You can always opt out. Refusal is respected immediately. Communicate clearly. An opt-out system (discreet card/marker by your mat) may be implemented.
en.s3_minors_text: Written parental consent required; parent/guardian must be present; guardian responsible for behavior, safety, and communication.
en.s4_text: Arrive clean with appropriate clothing; use equipment correctly and return it neatly; dispose of waste; report damage or safety issues immediately.
en.s5_integrity: Academic/professional integrity: No plagiarism; no sharing of manuals, PDFs, or teaching materials; students may not record classes or photograph materials. Feedback is given professionally without shaming.
en.s5_boundaries: Professional boundaries: Clear boundaries between teachers and students; no flirting, pressure, or favoritism in training settings.
en.s6_text: Must reflect studio standards in comments, DMs, groups, emails, and platforms. No harassment, aggressive tone, shaming, spam, threats, doxxing, or unauthorized sharing of links/logins/recordings.
en.s7_text: All content is protected by copyright. Participants/students may not record classes/courses or photograph materials. Yoga Bible may record during classes and events for teaching and marketing purposes.
en.s8_confidentiality: Confidentiality: Client lists, internal systems, teaching designs, pricing, strategy, and materials are confidential — even after the collaboration ends.
en.s8_nonsolicit: Non-Solicit: No student poaching or client/student redirection. Standard: 24-month non-solicit period.
en.s9_studio: In the studio: Tell a teacher or reception, follow up via email
en.s9_details: Include: What happened, when, where; who was involved; screenshots/documentation if relevant; desired outcome.
en.s10_text: Proportional, case-by-case assessments. Possible actions: guidance and warning; temporary suspension or access restriction; immediate removal from session; revocation of digital access; termination of collaboration/contract; police report for serious cases.
en.closing: Thank you for contributing to a strong and safe environment.
